overview.Name: Vita Coco Company Inc
overview.Description: Vita Coco Company, Inc. develops, markets, and distributes coconut water products under the Vita Coco brand in the United States, Canada, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia Pacific. The company is headquartered in New York, New York.
overview.Address: 111 FIFTH AVENUE, NEW YORK, NY, UNITED STATES, 10003
